title: Getting a login
excerpt: When I go to monday.com, the web page says I am a guest.  When I click on “Create Account” I just get sent back to the guest page.  How do I create an account?  I work for a global enterprise that has monday.com licences…

posts.author: BernardS (bernard.szczech@uk.ibm.com)
posts.cookedHtml: When I go to monday.com, the web page says I am a guest. When I click on “Create Account” I just get sent back to the guest page. How do I create an account? I work for a global enterprise that has monday.com licences.

posts.author: BernardS (bernard.szczech@uk.ibm.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for responding, I’m grateful to you. But that’s exactly what my problem is. Someone in my organisation invited me. The system set me up as a guest rather than an employee. I don’t know why. Now I can’t delete the fact I’m a guest. Can anyone advise how I delete my guest account so I can start again?

posts.author: adinap (Adina Pierce)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bernard,
Use this URL and pick the SAML option:

ibm.monday.com

Welcome to monday.com | a new way of working

monday.com Work OS is an open platform where anyone can create the tools they need to run every aspect of their work.

Adina
IBM Consulting
